text: THE MANY SEEDS OF THE POMEGRANATE TAKE AWHILE TO CHEW THOROUGHLY, BUT THE VIRILE FEELING OF QUICKENING BLOOD IS EXCITING!
parsedMeaning: Consumable object or food-trigger text. Likely changes life force, power, constitution, or a related trait.

likelyActions: change life/power/trait when the runtime supports stat actions

text: YOUR HORSE ACTS FRIGHTENED AND WON'T GO THROUGH THE DOOR.
parsedMeaning: Conditional portal/door rejection when the player has or rides a horse.

suggestedNewAcsObjects.likelyCondition: hasItem horse or party contains horse
